outputDir.label: Output directory
outputDir.description: Where to save the .gif files. Leading ~ is expanded to $HOME.

fps.label: Frame rate
fps.description: GIF frame rate. 15-25 is a good balance between smoothness and file size.

maxRecordingSeconds.label: Auto-stop after (seconds)
maxRecordingSeconds.description: Maximum recording duration before auto-stopping. Use 0 to disable.
